user.title: LLM Gateway
user.description: Connect to an OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint. The default targets NVIDIA NIM, which offers a free tier.

data_description.base_url: OpenAI-compatible base URL, including the version path (e.g. /v1).
data_description.api_key: Bearer token used to authenticate with the endpoint.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the endpoint.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the API key.

data_description.routing_mode: Use auto for voice-first routing, or force one model tier for debugging.
data_description.fast_model: Low-latency model used for normal voice replies, clarification and home control repair.
data_description.mid_model: Balanced model used for search-backed answers and device diagnostics.
data_description.deep_model: High-capability model used for long reasoning. Deep turns run as background tasks and do not directly control Home Assistant.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select one or more APIs to let the model control your home. Leave empty for chat only.
data_description.prompt: System instructions that tell the model how to behave.
data_description.max_tokens: Backward-compatible value used when no fast tier value is set.
data_description.fast_max_tokens: Maximum tokens for fast voice turns.
data_description.mid_max_tokens: Maximum tokens for mid search or diagnostic turns.
data_description.deep_max_tokens: Maximum tokens for deep background tasks.
data_description.temperature: Higher values make output more random; lower values make it more focused.
data_description.extra_body: Backward-compatible JSON merged into fast requests when no fast extra body is set. Streaming is not supported here.
data_description.fast_extra_body: Additional OpenAI-compatible JSON merged into fast chat/completions requests.
data_description.mid_extra_body: Additional OpenAI-compatible JSON merged into mid chat/completions requests.
data_description.deep_extra_body: Additional OpenAI-compatible JSON merged into deep chat/completions requests, such as reasoning_budget or chat_template_kwargs.
data_description.chat_timeout: Backward-compatible timeout used when no fast tier timeout is set.
data_description.fast_chat_timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for fast non-streaming chat/completions requests.
data_description.mid_chat_timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for mid non-streaming chat/completions requests.
data_description.deep_chat_timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for deep background chat/completions requests.
data_description.search_enabled: Expose search_web only when a search key is configured and the user request is allowed to search.

error.invalid_json: Extra request body must be valid JSON.
